name: eval-optimizer
summary: Generate an artifact, evaluate it against a rubric, iterate until threshold met or max iterations reached. Two-role loop: generator + evaluator.
when_to_use: Quality-critical artifacts where objective evaluation is possible (configs, security code, schema migrations). Not for subjective work (prose style).

layers.CLAUDE.md: Add rule: 'Generated code/configs must pass quality evaluation before committing. Use the evaluator-optimizer loop for quality-critical outputs.'
layers.hook: Stop hook may enforce minimum eval score before allowing turn close.
layers.agent: agents/evaluator-optimizer runs the loop: generate → score → refine. Threshold default ≥80; max iterations 5.

cost: ~1.5–3× normal. Each refinement cycle is a full pass. Budget explicitly or it overruns.
anti_patterns: No max-iterations cap — loop runs until budget burns.
Generator and evaluator are the same agent — blind spots persist.
